bikes.description: It is a 2019 model with some wear. Includes a peeling "dirty kitten gravel" sticker on the top tube. Somewhat dirty had a seat post bag and a bag on the top tube. Handlebar tape on the left side frayed due to a recent accident. and shifters also scraped. Selle Italia Diva saddle. Two bottle cages, black or blue
bikes.title: 2019 Trek Domane

bikes.description: Gravel bike with very prominent orange color. When stolen, a Ortlieb Quick Rack was installed on the back, as well as a small black/beige pouch screwed to the front of the top tube. The bike also had reflectors installed on most of the spokes, and it had hybrid pedals (one side normal, one side Shimano-type clips) installed.
bikes.title: SCOTT Speedster Gravel 30

bikes.description:
Matte black with gold/orange lettering on the side. Gravel bike. SL 6 Disc in 58cm.
Note: photo is not exact - lettering is more gold/bronze
bikes.title: 2019 Trek Domane

bikes.description:
The GT Transeo 4.0 is a hybrid bike designed for riders who want something versatile — comfortable for commuting and fitness rides, but also capable of handling light trails and gravel. Here are the main details about it:
Overview
Category: Hybrid / Fitness / Commuter
Brand: GT Bicycles 
Frame: Aluminum (lightweight, durable, upright geometry)
Fork: Equipped with a front suspension fork with a lockout option for efficient road riding
Wheels: 700c wheels (like a road bike, but wider tires for stability and comfort)
Speeds/Drivetrain: Typically a 3x8 (24-speed) Shimano or microSHIFT drivetrain
Brakes: Mechanical disc brakes (reliable stopping power in all weather, but not hydraulic)
Tires: 700x40c (good balance of speed and shock absorption)
Other features: Rack and fender mounts, blue MEC carrying panniers.
bikes.title: GT Bicycles Transeo 4.0

bikes.description: Stock Triban RC120, I put tanwall gravel tires on it, microshift XLE 2x8 groupset, black bar tape and black saddle, reflectors on both wheels
bikes.title: 2025 Decathlon Triban RC120

bikes.description: Black frame with very noticeable bright blue Mtn biking pedals (clips on one side) and blue constellations bike seat from Terri

bikes.description:
Gravel Bike from Stevens, Type Camino Pro. First version with only one Sprocket (newer one have two). Primary Color is Silver, secondary Black. On the left side of the Frame was (is) a sticker with the Logo of the trader.
The Bag under the sattle was not mounted.

bikes.description: Bike is a gravel bike. It has upgraded deep dish LIGHT road rims.  Pedals are flat on one side and spd on the other

bikes.description:
A light beige Canyon Grizl 7 gravel bike purchased September 2024. Stolen in Darmstadt February 2025.

- Light scratching on side of top pipe
- Small box on top pipe
- Canyon side loader bottle holder on bottom pipe
- Clamp for ABUS Bordo lock on back pipe
- Wahoo clamp and M-Wave noisemaker on handlebar
- Tool bag under saddle
bikes.title: 2021 Canyon bicycles Grizl 7

bikes.description: Sea breeze blue, camp and go slow western rattler bar tape (brown diamond pattern), blue tiger sticker on RH side of down tube. scuffs inside forks and chain stays from mud rub.
bikes.title: 2020 Cervélo Aspero

bikes.description: Kona steel gravel bike in mint green color. Specialized Pathfinder Pro Byway Tires (700x38). Copper colored bottle cages. Silver rear rack. Shimano 1x11. Kona WTB Saddle. Black flat pedals. Disc brakes. Behind Bars shop sticker on bottom of seat tube behind bottle cage. No handlebar tape plug on right side.
bikes.title: 2016 Kona Rove ST

bikes.description:
Color: Dark blue frame with a glossy finish. The paint shows minor scuffs and wear, particularly near the bottom bracket and chainstay, reflecting typical usage.

Frame Size & Design: The bike features a medium-sized frame with a slightly slanted top tube. The tube joints are visibly welded and reinforced, providing extra durability for off-road or urban riding.

Gears & Drivetrain: Equipped with a standard multi-speed gear setup. It has a triple chainring in the front and a 7-speed cassette in the rear, allowing for smooth shifting over a range of terrains. The derailleurs and shifters are operational but show minor signs of use.

Brakes: The bike uses traditional rim brakes, both front and rear, which are in good working order. The brake levers on the handlebars are black and slightly worn from use.

Handlebars: The handlebars are flat, straight, and black, with wear visible on the grips. The right grip end has a small cap missing, exposing the inner handlebar tube. The handlebar stem shows slight rust and wear, while the cables for the brakes and shifters are externally routed, curving smoothly toward the frame.

Tires & Wheels: The tires are thick, knobby, and designed for multi-surface riding, with a deep tread pattern ideal for gravel or rough urban surfaces. The tires are mounted on aluminum rims, which appear to be in good shape. Both wheels are secured with standard quick-release mechanisms.

Saddle: The saddle is a basic black vinyl model, showing slight wear but no visible damage. It's supported by a standard seat post with a quick-release mechanism for easy height adjustments.

Water Bottle & Holder: White water bottle that says 'Silvera for Seniors' is a sipper style 500 ml bottle and is on a metal bottle cage that is located in the vertical rod of the bike just above the front gear chain

Accessories:

Lock: A black coiled cable lock is attached around the frame, securing the bike when parked.
Green Bag: A small green bag is mounted on the handlebar stem, possibly used for small items or tools.
Reflectors: There are red rear reflectors and front-mounted white reflectors for visibility.
Bar Code: The bike features a barcode sticker on the frame near the handlebar with the number "70410 01847."

Distinctive Marks: The handlebar stem has visible rust and slight wear, while the grips show signs of extended use.
bikes.title: Supercycle BREEZE

bikes.description:
Serial # impression is faint, difficult to discern, stamped on the bottom of bottom bracket

Aftermarket accessories:
--handlebars are double wrapped with black bar tape
--80mm Redshift ShockStop stem
--pewter Blackburn Outpost Cargo Cages on each side of fork
--Black Axiom DLX Streamliner Disc Rear Rack
--Shimano PD-EH500 dual SPD/Platform pedals
--matte black plastic SKS front and rear fenders with mudflaps
--Black Jamis saddle
--one headlight
--one red LED strobe rear light
--two silver aluminum bottle cages
--an intertube wrapped around chain stay to prevent wear from chain slap
--Bits of innertube were fastened with electrical tape to protect common wear points on the fork and frame.
bikes.title: 2021 Motobecane Gravel X3

bikes.description:
The attached photos are old. The below description is for the current appearance.
It is a dark grey colour ADV (gravel) bike, with an orange accent colour. 
It has a U shape heavy lock on the left side from ABUS with a red-head
The seat booster rod has an accessory to attach a kid's seat to the bike, it is no longer attached to the bike frame as in the picture.
The Cateye front white and back red flashers.
bikes.title: Boardman Bikes ADV 8.6

bikes.description: It is a Salsa Journeyer Advent 650b. It is all black with "Salsa" written in blue on the bottom tube. It has a small dent on the top tube. It has a peak design magnet phone mount on the handlebar. It has curved drop down handlebars that are wrapped with black wraps. It has dual clip on/flat crank brothers pedals. It has 4 mounting spots on it. It has one black and one blue water bottle holder on the bottom tube. It has a lizard skin chain protector underneath the chain. It has hybrid 650 gravel tires with knobs on the side and smooth tread in the middle.
bikes.title: 2022 Salsa Journeyer Advent 650b

bikes.description: White bike with drops bars. Stock seat. Gravel tires. Small frame. At the time of theft it had a mount for a bike computer, a black bell, a rear red light, rearview mirror on left side, and a center bottle cage.
bikes.title: 2023 Trek Checkpoint ALR 5

bikes.description:
Ambition helps motivate us. It helps us strive for more and reach new goals.

The X Ambition is built for more. More miles, more adventures, more smiles! You may know the Poseidon X and the X Ambition is the more improved version. We focused on improved comfort with a more upright riding position and a new saddle design. We increased braking power by adding the same brakes as the Redwood and completed the build with 700 x 40 Kenda Happy Medium tires for good speed on the road and grip on gravel.
bikes.title: 2024 Poseidon Prowheel gravel

bikes.description:
• Premium grade gravel race carbon GRX Di2/disc brake bicycle that improves on original design
• Upgraded carbon fiber, and lay-up schedule for stiffer, faster design with aerodynamic improvements
• Use of D-shaped, tapered carbon fork steerer design, with included bar & stem for full wire/housing integration including dropper post
• Change allows for more aero headtube design and reduced drag from integrated routing
• Lower, more stable road-like feel from overall geometry, chainstay length, BB drop
• Accepts 700c x 43mm tires / 650b x 51mm tires; minimum 4mm side clearance
• Trail Mixer fork dropouts can be switched for +/- 5mm selectable fork offset; 62mm optimal Trail
• Forward position=decreased trail=faster handling | Rearward position=increased trail=slower handling
• Squoval.Max tube designs, enlarged and enhanced for rough surfaces; fork/downtube integration
• Large downtube BBright bottom bracket shell w/ oversized dropped chainstays
• Carbon lay-up, round seatpost, larger volume tires contribute to rider comfort
• 1x/2x compatible, with mechanical or electronic shifting systems; removable braze-on FD mount
• Frameset
o Frame: Aspero-5 Carbon, full internal routing, Flat Mount caliper interface, 12/142mm TA dropout
o Fork: Tapered Áspero-5 Fork, Adjustable Trail; D-Shaped steerer, Flat Mount caliper interface, 12/100mm TA dropout
o Headset: FSA IS-2 1¼ x 1½"
o Thru-axles: Cervélo indexed/threaded: 12/100mm, 12/142mm
• Groupset: Shimano GRX 815 Di2 2x11 w/ hydraulic disc braking; internal eTube wiring, seatpost battery
o Dual Control levers: Di2 Shifting with mineral oil based hydraulic braking set-up
o Brake Calipers/Rotors: Shimano GRX RX815 Hydraulic Disc w/ SM-RT800 CL 160mm rotors
o Derailleurs: GRX 815 Di2 Front (braze-on), Rear (up to 34T max cog)
o Crankset/BB: GRX 810 48/31T / Cervélo BBright JY-BB 24 bottom bracket
o Cassette/Chain: HG800 11-34T / CN701
• Wheelset & Tires
o Cervélo Reserve with 32mm Carbon rims (IRW 24mm), TLR, DT350 HG11, CL disc
o Panaracer Gravel King SK TLR 700x38
• Cockpit & Accessories
o Handlebar: Carbon AB09 16° Flared Carbon, 31.8mm, integrated routing; Cervélo bar tape
o Stem: Cervélo ST32 Alloy, 31.8, (for Cervélo D-shaped fork steerer tube, integrated routing)
o Seatpost: Cervélo SP19 Carbon 27.2mm round (48-54cm Zero offset, 56-61cm, 25mm setback)
o Saddle: Prologo Dimension Nack
o Cervélo accessories: Stem Faceplate Computer/Acc mount, Rear Accessory Mount, and Smartpak 400A Top Tube Storage Bag, Downtube Protector
• Component specifics by frame size:
o 48cm Bar width: 38c-c, Stem length: 70mm, Crank length: 165mm
• Colors: Five Black
• Sizes: 48 cm
• Weight: 18.69 lbs (56cm)

Geometry
Size	48
Wheel Size	700
Stack	505mm
Reach	370mm
Head Angle	71°
Seat Angle	74.5°
Top Tube Length	512mm
Head Tube Length	83mm
Standover	690mm
Fork Trail	58.6mm
Fork Offset	52mm
Bottom Bracket Drop	78.5mm
Front Center	583mm
Wheelbase	990mm
Chainstay Length	420mm
bikes.title: 2023 Cervélo ASPERO – 5 GRX RX815 Di2
